business.name: VRK Tours and Travels
business.tagline: Car booking, one way trips, tour packages, and day packages
business.paymentInstructions: Owner will share a quotation before customer payment.
business.gatewayNote: Online gateway can be connected later with Razorpay or Stripe merchant keys.
business.authNote: OTP login, Google login, Apple login, and Microsoft login require provider accounts and production keys before enabling.
business.aboutText: VRK Tours and Travels helps customers book cars, one-day packages, outstation trips, airport and railway transfers, wedding/event duty, corporate travel, and custom tours with owner-confirmed pricing.
business.footerText: Owner-confirmed cars, drivers, route plans, quotations, and booking support.
business.privacyPolicy: Customer contact and trip details are used only for quotation, booking coordination, billing, and trip support.
business.cancellationPolicy: Cancellation and refund depend on vehicle assignment, driver movement, permits, hotel/package commitments, and owner confirmation.
business.pricingPolicy: Website fare is an estimate. Final fare is confirmed by VRK Tours and Travels after route, distance, timing, toll, parking, permit, and vehicle review.
business.safetyGuidelines: Passengers should share accurate pickup details, carry required ID proof, follow driver safety instructions, and avoid unsafe route changes.
business.faqText: Final car, driver, route, fare, advance, balance, and payment method are confirmed by the owner before travel.
terms: Quotation is confirmed by owner/admin before payment.
Toll, parking, permit, extra kilometers, and night charges are applied as per owner confirmation.
Driver and vehicle details may be updated before trip start.

popupSettings.title: Plan your next trip with VRK
popupSettings.message: Send a booking request and owner will share a quotation.
